entries.sentence: Write your home address at the top of the form.
entries.chinese: address = 地址；在表格顶部写下你的家庭地址。

entries.sentence: This is a quiet area near the station.
entries.chinese: area = 地区；这是车站附近一个安静的地区。

entries.sentence: The library is the oldest building in our town.
entries.chinese: building = 建筑物；图书馆是我们镇上最古老的建筑物。

entries.sentence: The hotel is in the centre of the city.
entries.chinese: centre = 中心；酒店位于市中心。

entries.sentence: More than a million people live in this city.
entries.chinese: city = 城市；这座城市居住着一百多万人。

entries.sentence: I will meet you at the corner of King Street.
entries.chinese: corner = 街角；我会在国王街的街角和你见面。

entries.sentence: Japan is a country in East Asia.
entries.chinese: country = 国家；日本是东亚的一个国家。

entries.sentence: The sun rises in the east.
entries.chinese: east = 东方；太阳从东方升起。

entries.sentence: We waited for our guide by the main entrance.
entries.chinese: entrance = 入口；我们在正门入口旁等导游。

entries.sentence: The emergency exit is at the back of the hall.
entries.chinese: exit = 出口；紧急出口在大厅后面。

entries.sentence: My cousin moved to Australia last year.
entries.chinese: Australia = 澳大利亚；我表哥去年搬到了澳大利亚。

entries.sentence: This beach is a perfect location for a picnic.
entries.chinese: location = 地点；这个海滩是野餐的理想地点。

entries.sentence: There are several small parks in our neighbourhood.
entries.chinese: neighbourhood = 社区；我们社区里有几个小公园。

entries.sentence: The mountains are in the north of the country.
entries.chinese: north = 北部；这些山位于这个国家的北部。

entries.sentence: The children played football in the park.
entries.chinese: park = 公园；孩子们在公园里踢足球。

entries.sentence: This cafe is a good place to study.
entries.chinese: place = 地方；这家咖啡馆是学习的好地方。

entries.sentence: The garden is open to the public every day.
entries.chinese: public = 公众；这个花园每天向公众开放。

entries.sentence: This region is famous for its lakes.
entries.chinese: region = 地区；这个地区以湖泊闻名。

entries.sentence: They grow oranges in the south of Spain.
entries.chinese: south = 南部；西班牙南部种植橙子。

entries.sentence: We go swimming at the sports centre on Fridays.
entries.chinese: sports centre = 体育中心；我们星期五去体育中心游泳。

entries.sentence: There is a post office across the street.
entries.chinese: street = 街道；街对面有一家邮局。

entries.sentence: The school concert will take place on Thursday.
entries.chinese: take place = 举行；学校音乐会将在星期四举行。

entries.sentence: Our town has a busy market on Saturdays.
entries.chinese: town = 城镇；我们镇星期六有一个热闹的市场。

entries.sentence: Only two hundred people live in the village.
entries.chinese: village = 村庄；这个村庄只有两百人居住。

entries.sentence: Dark clouds were moving in from the west.
entries.chinese: west = 西方；乌云正从西方飘来。

entries.sentence: Every animal at the shelter needs a safe home.
entries.chinese: animal = 动物；收容所里的每只动物都需要一个安全的家。

entries.sentence: An ant carried a leaf across the path.
entries.chinese: ant = 蚂蚁；一只蚂蚁叼着叶子穿过小路。

entries.sentence: We saw a brown bear beside the river.
entries.chinese: bear = 熊；我们在河边看到了一只棕熊。

entries.sentence: A bee landed on the yellow flower.
entries.chinese: bee = 蜜蜂；一只蜜蜂落在黄色花朵上。

entries.sentence: A small bird built a nest in the tree.
entries.chinese: bird = 鸟；一只小鸟在树上筑了巢。

entries.sentence: The cat was asleep under the kitchen table.
entries.chinese: cat = 猫；那只猫在厨房桌子下面睡着了。

entries.sentence: The farmer feeds each cow early in the morning.
entries.chinese: cow = 奶牛；农民一大早给每头奶牛喂食。

entries.sentence: Our dog waits by the door when I come home.
entries.chinese: dog = 狗；我回家时，我们的狗会在门边等着。

entries.sentence: A duck swam across the pond with its young.
entries.chinese: duck = 鸭子；一只鸭子带着幼鸭游过池塘。

entries.sentence: The elephant used its trunk to pick up the branch.
entries.chinese: elephant = 大象；大象用鼻子捡起了树枝。

entries.sentence: The giraffe reached the leaves at the top of the tree.
entries.chinese: giraffe = 长颈鹿；长颈鹿够到了树顶的叶子。

entries.sentence: She learned to ride a horse on the farm.
entries.chinese: horse = 马；她在农场学会了骑马。

entries.sentence: This insect has bright green wings.
entries.chinese: insect = 昆虫；这种昆虫有鲜绿色的翅膀。

entries.sentence: The lion rested in the shade during the afternoon.
entries.chinese: lion = 狮子；狮子下午在阴凉处休息。

entries.sentence: The monkey climbed quickly to the top branch.
entries.chinese: monkey = 猴子；猴子很快爬到了最高的树枝上。

entries.sentence: A tiny mouse ran behind the cupboard.
entries.chinese: mouse = 老鼠；一只小老鼠跑到了碗柜后面。

entries.sentence: The penguin kept its egg warm on the ice.
entries.chinese: penguin = 企鹅；企鹅在冰面上给蛋保暖。

entries.sentence: The puppy followed me around the garden.
entries.chinese: puppy = 小狗；小狗跟着我在花园里到处走。

entries.sentence: The rabbit disappeared into a hole.
entries.chinese: rabbit = 兔子；兔子消失在一个洞里。

entries.sentence: The snake lay quietly on a warm rock.
entries.chinese: snake = 蛇；蛇安静地趴在一块温暖的岩石上。

entries.sentence: A tiger can move silently through tall grass.
entries.chinese: tiger = 老虎；老虎能悄无声息地穿过高草。

entries.sentence: Each zebra has a different pattern of stripes.
entries.chinese: zebra = 斑马；每匹斑马都有不同的条纹图案。

entries.sentence: We joined a guided tour of the old castle.
entries.chinese: guided = 有导游的；我们参加了老城堡的导览游。

entries.sentence: Tourism provides many jobs in this coastal town.
entries.chinese: tourism = 旅游业；旅游业为这个海滨小镇提供了许多工作。

entries.sentence: The tourist information centre gave us a free map.
entries.chinese: tourist information centre = 游客信息中心；游客信息中心给了我们一张免费地图。
